_comment: Task 8 controller-verified counted cells. Every other directory under experiments/runs/ is shakeout or instrument-invalid per DEVIATIONS.md and PROTOCOL.md's amendment sequence (protocol_version 2-8) and is excluded from all analysis. One justification line per entry below.

graph-guard.justification: First three cells run after protocol_version 8 (gpt-5.6-terra pin) and after the v6 instrument fix (exclude-form pytest_args) that reclassified graph-guard's earlier oneshot/loop-same cells INSTRUMENT-INVALID (DEVIATIONS.md rows 26/28). loop_cross (loop-cross-20260710T194101Z) verdict is 'rejected': round 0 (tester) failed pristine validation ('invalid: fails on pristine code'), so it is a legitimate rejected-round outcome under PROTOCOL.md Sec.6, not a discarded run -- but it means graph-guard has NO valid loop-cross kill data. Per controller instruction, this cell counts as present (preserves the H1 loop-same/oneshot comparison and the arm's cost) but is treated as a MISSING H2 comparison for graph-guard: excluded from graph-guard's H2 per-subject table and from both pooled H2 views (Sec.6, 'aborted/rejected cell is missing data, not a zero').

rag-guard.justification: Run after the v6 exclude-form pytest_args fix (protocol_version 8 config) that resolved rag-guard's earlier include-list silent-zero corruption (DEVIATIONS.md row 25/27). All three cells verdict oneshot/clean/clean with the canary-verified scope; counted in full for both H1 and H2.

packaging.justification: Run after prep.py's drop_stale_testpaths fix and the zero-test-baseline engine fix (protocol_version 4), post-dating the earlier INFRA FAILURE cells (DEVIATIONS.md row 23). All three cells verdict oneshot/dry/dry; counted in full for both H1 and H2.

idna.justification: Run after the -uall add-only status fix (DEVIATIONS.md row 22) that resolved idna's untracked-tests-dir false rejection, and after the zero-test-baseline engine fix. All three cells verdict oneshot/clean/clean; counted in full for both H1 and H2.

attrition-risk-ml.justification: Run after the SandboxStatsFailure detector (protocol_version 5) and the src-layout import shim + import_hint (protocol_version 7) that resolved the earlier laundered-crash false-zero cells (DEVIATIONS.md row 24/29). All three cells verdict oneshot/dry/cap; counted in full for both H1 and H2. Per PROTOCOL.md Sec.3.1/Sec.4, attrition-risk-ml's 0-kill pristine baseline means it is NEVER used in any relative-improvement ratio and is reported separately in the pooled-without-attrition McNemar view.
